misc: Bags Miura irons and is rumoured to sleep with them.
biography: Miso, a formidable presence from Hirsala Golf, has been a fixture at the Hector Trophée, bringing a unique blend of intensity and focus to the competition. Known for his meticulous preparation and unwavering dedication, Miso's commitment to the sport is beyond reproach. He has participated in the event on 10 occasions.

Miso's passion extends beyond the course; rumour has it that he reveres his Miura irons to such an extent that he sleeps with them, a testament to his deep connection with the tools of his trade. This level of dedication, while perhaps eccentric, underscores his singular focus on achieving excellence in every aspect of the game.

To date, Miso has secured one coveted Hector Trophée victory, a testament to his ability to perform under pressure and his strategic acumen in the pair format. While the Victor Trophy has remained elusive, his pursuit of individual excellence is relentless, and he continues to refine his skills with characteristic diligence.

Although Miso is not currently slated to participate in the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026, his competitive spirit and love for the game suggest that a return to the competition remains a distinct possibility. His fans and fellow competitors alike eagerly await his next appearance, where his unique blend of skill and passion will undoubtedly make for a compelling performance.
